patches_added.name: Bypass device validation
patches_added.description: Neutralizes the client-side device-validation gate (anti-root / anti-emulator / anti-Frida / anti-Xposed / anti-tamper battery) that shows a "Device validation failed" toast and kills the app via finishAffinity() on a rooted, emulated or re-signed build. Redirects the single failure callback to the success path so all ~16 checks report as passed and the app keeps running pre- and post-login.
